title: Priority Fix Review Result
description: Content review and enrichment output from lighthouse.validate_priority_fixes (validate_priority_fixes track step). Matches tool-packs/lighthouse-parser-pack/schemas/lighthouse.validate_priority_fixes.output.schema.json at a structural level. This is not a pass/fail verification gate.

thinking.description: Optional model reasoning carried forward from prioritize_fixes

priorityFixes.description: Audit-backed priority fixes accepted for downstream matching

needsReview.description: Fixes that could not be matched or should not ship as high priority
